item.name: Fetch Factset Answer in Adaptive Card Format

request.name: Fetch Factset Answer in Adaptive Card Format

description.content: Returns an answer to the specified query (if valid answer exists) in the Adaptive Card format (https://adaptivecards.io/).

query.description: (Required) Query for desired answer (e.g., "fds price")
Includes thumbnail of Adaptive Card in response
Disables no-result answer responses (no-results and answer without data)
Theme for desired answer (e.g., "Light", "Dark")

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

response.name: Unhandled error occurred while processing the request.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Fetch Factset Answer in Data Format

request.name: Fetch Factset Answer in Data Format

description.content: Returns an answer to the specified query (if a valid answer exists). Returns the answer data only (as JSON), without any markup information.

query.description: (Required) Query for desired answer (e.g., "fds price")
Name of application consuming the API (used for analytics purposes)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

response.name: Unhandled error occurred while processing the request.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

reflecting the data shown within FactSet Search Answers.
